'''Elth Nardah''' was an older [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], with wizened skin and stooped shoulders. He was known to have dressed well, in the style of the Old [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. He held the title of doctor and was a member of the [[Alliance Diplomatic Corps]]. His primary concern was keeping primitive populations from becoming [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

He spent time on [[Karra]] with the native [[Karran]] trying to [[Primitive Sentient Protection and Alliance, Operation 265-A: Karra|negotiate]] a treaty between them and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He was killed by [[Tist]] and a group of Karran warriors who were upset that he took the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Darryn Edalm]] prisoner rather than killing him outright.
